predial.descripcion_estructural: Ninguna variante validó (declared='desconocido'). Razones: tarifa_millar: List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0; progresivo: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0; tasa_unica: List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0; cuota_fija_simple: List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0; cuota_fija_escalonada: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0; mixto: List should have at least 2 items after validation, not 0
predial.comentarios: Texto insuficiente o no contiene la mecánica de cálculo del impuesto predial.
